chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Misc. Application No. S- 434 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 15.08.2024 Mr. Imtiaz Ali Abbasi advocate for applicant. Ms. Rameshan Oad, Assistant Prosecutor General. ZULFIQAR ALI SANGI, J.- Applicant challenges order dated: 04-07-2024 passed by the Ex-officio Justice of Peace/ IX Addition Session Judge, Hyderabad wherein her application for registration of FIR was dismissed. Heard learned counsel for the applicant, Learned APG for the State and perused the impugned order with their able assistance. From perusal of the impugned order, it reveals that by assigning the following reasons the application of the applicant was dismissed. “As per police report, the sons of applicant namely Azeem and Ahitsham have criminal record and two FIRs No.78/2021 U/S 5-A Gambling Act and FIR No. 138/2021 U/S 147, 148,149, 506/2 PPC of PS Hali were registered against them. However, the applicant wants to save her skin by clutches of law while no such incident as mentioned in para No.4 of application was taken place besides no any concrete proof of involvement of proposed accused in such like incident has been produced by the applicant. In these circumstances enumerated above and reports submitted by respondent Nos. 1 & 2 no case for registration of FIR or intimidation is made out, resultantly the instant Cr. Misc. application is dismissed.” No illegality or any infirmity is pointed out nor is the same observed in the above impugned order which require interference of this court. Resultantly, the application being misconceived is hereby dismissed.

Misc. application is dismissed.” No illegality or any infirmity is pointed out nor is the same observed in the above impugned order which require interference of this court. Resultantly, the application being misconceived is hereby dismissed. J U D G E
